texts.content_text2:
Imagine the following scenario: A new detainee arrives at the prison. During the intake process, a staff member considers how to handle questions about religious beliefs.
What should the staff member do?
texts.content_text100: Require the detainee to declare their religious beliefs as part of the admission process
texts.content_text101: Inform the detainee that sharing religious beliefs is optional and respect their choice
texts.content_text3: Detainees have the right to privacy and cannot be required to disclose their religious beliefs if they do not wish to do so.
